message:
feat(agent-drivers): centralized logging and driver reliability improvements

## Logging Infrastructure
- Add logDriver() helper in base-driver.ts for structured driver logging
- Add setDriverLogger() to allow custom logger injection
- Add FLYWHEEL_DRIVER_DEBUG env var to control log verbosity
- Replace all console.* calls with logDriver() across all drivers
- Change default logger in registry.ts to no-ops (silent by default)
  Consumers must explicitly enable driver logging via setDriverLogger()

## Error Handling & Reliability
- base-driver.ts: Add onEventError callback for subscriber error handling
- base-driver.ts: Wrap doSend() in try-catch, emit error event on failure
- acp-driver.ts: Reject pending RPC requests on process exit
- acp-driver.ts: Add handleJsonRpcResponse() for proper JSON-RPC handling
- acp-driver.ts: Add safeStringify() for safe tool result serialization
- acp-driver.ts: Guard stdin.flush() - check if method exists before calling
- claude-driver.ts: Fix delay() to handle pre-aborted signals correctly
- claude-driver.ts: Fix delay() to clean up abort listener on timeout
- tmux-driver.ts: Improve output diffing algorithm for captured content
- tmux-driver.ts: Fix error state detection (remove "Error:" false positive)

## Token Usage
- base-driver.ts: Auto-compute totalTokens when not provided
  (totalTokens = promptTokens + completionTokens)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
